author: #incidents
content:
priya.k: Alert firing: high latency on payments checkout. Tracing shows repeated connection pool exhaustion on the legacy gateway.
devansh: Major outage during Black Friday load test traced to gateway's connection pool limit. PR #442 patch did not resolve root cause under high concurrent requests.
admin: Legacy gateway has been deprecated. Transitioning remaining traffic to StripeConnect under PAY-201.
